title: ACG readiness_score — Formal Definition and Invariants
description: Normative specification for readiness_score invariants. This is the authority for readiness scoring.

W1.rationale: A repository without a detectable entrypoint has no clear execution chain.

W2.rationale: Control files define the repository's operating contract.

W3.rationale: Repositories with no open_now files are opaque to the agent. Saturates at 25% to avoid inflating trivial repositories.

W4.rationale: Broken references indicate structural inconsistency. Penalty is proportional.

halt_condition.rationale: A repository with neither entrypoint nor control files should never silently pass.
halt_condition.formal: if (not has_entrypoint) and (not has_control): score = min(score, 0.44)

invariants.description: guardrail_mode is a deterministic function of readiness_score.
invariants.formal: guardrail_mode = f(readiness_score) using the thresholds above.

invariants.description: Halt condition is irrevocable by configuration.
invariants.formal: If has_entrypoint=false AND has_control=false, readiness_score <= 0.44 always.

invariants.description: CI exit code is derived from guardrail_mode. Halt always blocks promotion.
invariants.formal: guardrail_mode=halt -> exit_code=2 -> CI fails -> promotion blocked

topology.basis: Centrality by in-degree in the real import graph.

extractor.js_ts: relative import regex: import ... from './path' | require('./path')

resolution: 1. Reconstruct relative path from importer directory.
topology.note: External dependencies do not resolve to local files and do not contribute to in_degree.

invariants.description: A file not imported by any other file has topology=0.
The file with max_in_degree receives topology=60.

known_gaps_v04_beta.description: JS/TS extractor resolves only relative imports. tsconfig path aliases are not resolved.
known_gaps_v04_beta.impact: In-degree is underestimated in projects with path aliases.
known_gaps_v04_beta.workaround: Add path alias resolution in v0.4-final.

known_gaps_v04_beta.description: Dynamic JS/TS imports are not captured.
known_gaps_v04_beta.impact: Dynamically loaded files have undercounted in_degree.

known_gaps_v04_beta.description: Python stem fallback can produce false positives when modules share the same stem.
known_gaps_v04_beta.impact: in_degree may be slightly inflated in repositories with colliding module names.
known_gaps_v04_beta.mitigation: Fallback activates only when path resolution fails.

known_gaps_v04_beta.description: acg-gateway.py is cooperative guidance, not sandboxing.
known_gaps_v04_beta.impact: Read prevention is not guaranteed without runtime enforcement.
known_gaps_v04_beta.formal_position: ACG detects, structures, and audits. It does not prevent reads without external runtime enforcement.

known_gaps_v04_beta.description: Multi-agent branch conflicts are not detected in real time.
known_gaps_v04_beta.impact: Two agents on different branches with overlapping scope may conflict at merge time.
